name: Total sweep
description: Total sweep is a calming tactical game where you guide drifting balls to break through numbered blocks that shift direction or erupt in explosive bursts. You adapt to unpredictable patterns, clear chaotic clusters, and push toward restoring balance. As you collect crystals, you strengthen your growing squad, giving you more ways to overcome each cleverly arranged challenge.
instructions: Aim with your touch and shoot the balls at the blocks with numbers Each touch takes 1 away from the number in the block When it is reset to zero it disappears Crystals obtained for destruction can be spent on a one-time increase in balls by 100 or on
